name: Ugly Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix according to package directions.
2. Pour the mixture into a well-greased, flour-free 9 x 13 inch pan.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the cream cheese, butter, and powdered sugar until combined.
4. Spoon the cream cheese mixture over the cake batter.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes.
6. Turn out the baked cake while hot and spread it evenly over the top of the cake, scraping any remaining mixture onto the surface.
